'''dathugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobe|dobe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobe|dobe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dathugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæthigith|dæthigith]] || [[word:dæthigij|dæthigij]] || [[word:dæthigish|dæthigish]] || [[word:dæthigi|dæthigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathuthuguth|dathuthuguth]] || [[word:dathuthuguj|dathuthuguj]] || [[word:dathuthugush|dathuthugush]] || [[word:dathuthugu|dathuthugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathuguth|dathuguth]] || [[word:dathuguj|dathuguj]] || [[word:dathugush|dathugush]] || [[word:dathugu|dathugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathufguth|dathufguth]] || [[word:dathufguj|dathufguj]] || [[word:dathufgush|dathufgush]] || [[word:dathufguf|dathufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dathuguthu|dathuguthu]] || [[word:dathuguju|dathuguju]] || [[word:dathugushu|dathugushu]] || [[word:dathuguku|dathuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dathuguth|dathuguth]] || [[word:dathuguj|dathuguj]] || [[word:dathugush|dathugush]] || [[word:dathugu|dathugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dathuguthul|dathuguthul]] || [[word:dathugujul|dathugujul]] || [[word:dathugushul|dathugushul]] || [[word:dathugukul|dathugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dathuguthuthu|dathuguthuthu]] || [[word:dathugujuju|dathugujuju]] || [[word:dathugushushu|dathugushushu]] || [[word:dathuguku|dathuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dathuguthun|dathuguthun]] || [[word:dathugujun|dathugujun]] || [[word:dathugushun|dathugushun]] || [[word:dathugukun|dathugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dathuguthuoro|dathuguthuoro]] || [[word:dathugujuoro|dathugujuoro]] || [[word:dathugushuoro|dathugushuoro]] || [[word:dathugukuoro|dathugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
